subject: fix: resolve 11 bugs found during codebase review (round 2)
body:
Fixes from comprehensive screen-level review covering admin, auth,
map, persistence, and database layers.

- Admin: non-admin users now see explicit denial message instead of
  silent redirect loop (_layout.tsx → login.tsx?error=not_admin)
- StationMarker: removed duplicate onSelected handler that caused
  double navigation on native tap
- useAppTheme: functional updater for toggleTheme prevents stale closure
- useAuth: memoize context value to prevent unnecessary consumer re-renders
- usePersistedState: move AsyncStorage.setItem out of setState updater
  (React may call updaters multiple times in StrictMode)
- useRecentSearches: fix double-prefixed storage key
  (fuelhunt_fuelhunt_ → fuelhunt_)
- alert.ts: cancelable: false on Android prevents unresolved Promise
  when user taps outside dialog
- database.ts: bulk_update_regulated_price returns number, not void
- bulk_price_update.sql: validate fuel type is regulated before updating
- price_history trigger: set search_path on SECURITY DEFINER function

Tags: bugfix, review, auth, persistence, database, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: patch
